title: Better F3
description: This mod reduces clutter on the F3 debug menu.
body:
This mod removes most of the unnecessary features from the F3 menu, so it doesn't take up the entire screen. Instead, the essential information is displayed in the top left corner when F3 is pressed.

The mod has been tested in 1.12.2, 1.17.1, 1.18, 1.18.1, 1.18.2, 1.19, 1.19.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.19.4, 1.20, 1.20.1, 1.20.2, 1.20.3, and 1.20.4. If you use this mod in a video, please credit me (chpas) in the description!

If you want a more customizable version of the mod, check out Better F3 Plus here: https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f3-plus

View this project on CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-f3
